fields.summary: Add AlwayReject policies for router and amrmproxy.
Enable YARN RM scale out via federation using multiple RM's

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: This could be relevant as a safe fallback, for example to disable access to the entire federation for a queue (without updating each RM in the federation), we could set this policies and prevent access.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: Policies APIs (for Router and AMRMProxy policies)

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

fields.summary: PolicyManager to tie together Router/AMRM Federation policies

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

fields.summary: Add a HashBasedRouterPolicy, and small policies and test refactoring.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

comments.body: Simple initial patch, includes router, amrmproxy, policies and policymanager that always reject all requests. This is useful for example as  a default behavior for non-configured queues (or typos).
